composite.tuning_provenance: walk-forward grid 2019-2025 (tune_weights.py, reports/weight_tuning.md); conf_share=0.8, z_cap=1.5 chosen by majority of out-of-sample season selections

ml_ranker.provenance: walk-forward OOS 2021-2025 at synthetic lines: GBDT 63.2-67.1%, RF 63.8-69.0%, tuned composite 57.1-59.5% (reports/ml_improvement_test.md). Shipped artifact = GBDT (fits on 2 cores); upgrade to RF offline: python3 ml_test.py --stage fit --models rf. Weekly retrain: --stage frame --append, then --stage fit.
ml_ranker.features_provenance: lean 6-group set (model_belief+proj_parts+player_status+market_pos+weather+qb_oline): walk-forward 2022-25 66.9% top-5 / 71.3% top-1 vs 65.2%/69.2% full set (docs/analysis_factor_combo.md); set to null to restore full feature space. + player_depth_rank (prior-8-game usage rank among that week's roster, nflvalue/depth_features.py): walk-forward 2021-24 pooled vs lean baseline top-5 65.15->66.37 (+1.22pp), top-1 68.35->69.64 (+1.29pp), log_loss 0.62811->0.62548 (-0.00263), unanimous at seeds 7/1234; 2025 single-shot holdout top-1 72.06->73.90, top-5 67.94->67.79, log_loss 0.62429->0.62683. Raw absence flags (rb1/wr1/te1 officially out, opp_db_outs_2plus, post_bye) FAILED their gate (top-5 -0.40pp, log_loss +0.00211) and are intentionally absent.
